creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Tue Dec 31 13:04:47 2013
New Revision: 338293
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338293

Log:
  - Update to 1.23
  - Add LICENSE
  - Support STAGEDIR
  - Use single space after WWW:
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove leading indefinite article from COMMENT
  
  Changes:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/SVN-Hooks/Changes
  PR:		ports/185191
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/Makefile	Tue Dec 31 12:59:50 2013	(r338292)
+++ head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/Makefile	Tue Dec 31 13:04:47 2013	(r338293)
@@ -2,13 +2,16 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	SVN-Hooks
-PORTVERSION=	1.21
+PORTVERSION=	1.23
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A framework for implementing Subversion hooks
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	Framework for implementing Subversion hooks
+
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Data-Util>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Data-Util \
 		p5-Email-Send>=0:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Email-Send \
@@ -23,22 +26,4 @@ RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 
-MAN3=		SVN::Hooks.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::AllowLogChange.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::AllowPropChange.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::CheckCapability.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::CheckJira.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::CheckLog.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::CheckMimeTypes.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::CheckProperty.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::CheckStructure.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::DenyChanges.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::DenyFilenames.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::Generic.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::JiraAcceptance.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::Mailer.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::Notify.3 \
-		SVN::Hooks::UpdateConfFile.3
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/distinfo	Tue Dec 31 12:59:50 2013	(r338292)
+++ head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/distinfo	Tue Dec 31 13:04:47 2013	(r338293)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (SVN-Hooks-1.21.tar.gz) = 45cb30b9e96911e356f8207168b86c443c06ff48c5bcdeeb56493f7d327a4535
-SIZE (SVN-Hooks-1.21.tar.gz) = 49027
+SHA256 (SVN-Hooks-1.23.tar.gz) = 68099a0d44d25bc2c194d2caff03ce741743e8d28c81fabcce486e4995939aea
+SIZE (SVN-Hooks-1.23.tar.gz) = 49273

Modified: head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/pkg-descr	Tue Dec 31 12:59:50 2013	(r338292)
+++ head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/pkg-descr	Tue Dec 31 13:04:47 2013	(r338293)
@@ -20,4 +20,4 @@ It also comes with post-commit hooks for
 But as a framework, it can be extended to implement all types of
 hooks.
 
-WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/SVN-Hooks/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/SVN-Hooks/

Modified: head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/pkg-plist	Tue Dec 31 12:59:50 2013	(r338292)
+++ head/devel/p5-SVN-Hooks/pkg-plist	Tue Dec 31 13:04:47 2013	(r338293)
@@ -15,6 +15,22 @@
 %%SITE_PERL%%/SVN/Hooks/Notify.pm
 %%SITE_PERL%%/SVN/Hooks/UpdateConfFile.pm
 %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/SVN/Hooks/.packlist
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::AllowLogChange.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::AllowPropChange.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::CheckCapability.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::CheckJira.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::CheckLog.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::CheckMimeTypes.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::CheckProperty.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::CheckStructure.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::DenyChanges.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::DenyFilenames.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::Generic.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::JiraAcceptance.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::Mailer.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::Notify.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/SVN::Hooks::UpdateConfFile.3.gz
 @dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/SVN/Hooks
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/SVN
 @dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/SVN/Hooks
